title: Banach Contraction Principle Flowchart
description: A visual representation of the conditions and conclusions of the Banach Fixed Point Theorem, showing how a contraction mapping on a complete metric space guarantees a unique fixed point.
relationships: T is defined on X with contraction constant 0 ≤ k < 1
Iteration: xₙ₊₁ = T(xₙ) generates a Cauchy sequence
Sequence converges to x* in X due to completeness
